steps.title: Convert the percentage to a multiplier
steps.content: The phrase 200% of means we multiply by the decimal equivalent of 200%. So Levi's collection is 2 times (or twice) the size of Marissa's collection.

steps.title: Calculate Levi's stamp count
steps.content:
Multiply Marissa's stamp count by the multiplier we found:
$$\text{Levi's stamps} = 2 \times 460 = 920$$
That confirms C is correct.
